name: example-fs-creative-voltage
title: Creative Voltage
description: Retro-modern single-file HTML decks: electric blue x deep navy split panels, neon yellow badges, halftone dot textures, and script flourishes with Syne + Space Mono on a fixed 1920x1080 stage that scales to any viewport. Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides Creative Voltage preset (STYLE_PRESETS.md section 3).

description_i18n.en: Retro-modern single-file HTML decks: electric blue x deep navy split panels, neon yellow badges, halftone dot textures, and script flourishes with Syne + Space Mono on a fixed 1920x1080 stage that scales to any viewport. Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides Creative Voltage preset (STYLE_PRESETS.md section 3).
description_i18n.zh-CN: 复古现代撞色单文件 HTML 幻灯片：电光蓝 × 深海军双色分割版面、荧光黄徽章、halftone 网点纹理与 script 手写点缀，Syne + Space Mono 字体，固定 1920x1080 舞台等比缩放适配任意屏幕。基于 zarazhangrui/frontend-slides 的 Creative Voltage 预设（STYLE_PRESETS.md 第 3 节）。

query.en: Create a {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}} as a {{density}} deck in the locked Creative Voltage theme: retro-modern, bold, energetic - electric blue x deep navy split panels, neon yellow accents, halftone dot textures, script flourishes. Output one self-contained single-file HTML deck with zero dependencies (all CSS/JS inline, no build step, no external JS libraries; the Google Fonts stylesheet link is the only external reference). Hard rules, all locked: (1) Fixed 16:9 stage - author every slide on a 1920x1080 canvas inside .deck-viewport > .deck-stage and scale the whole stage uniformly with one transform (factor = min(innerWidth/1920, innerHeight/1080), centered with letterbox); never reflow content per device and never use responsive breakpoints inside slides. (2) Each page is one <section class="slide">; switch slides only via .active/.visible classes toggling visibility/opacity/pointer-events - never display:none. (3) Keyboard navigation (arrows, Space, PageUp/PageDown, Home/End), debounced wheel, touch swipe, and #/<index> hash routing with deep-link restore; page counter chrome fixed outside the scaled stage. (4) Theme tokens are LOCKED in :root - --stage-bg:#10101f, --slide-bg/--bg-dark:#1a1a2e, --bg-primary:#0066ff, --bg-primary-deep:#0052cc, --bg-dark-2:#23234a, --accent-neon:#d4ff00, --text-light:#ffffff plus the dim/faint/line rgba steps from the seed; fonts are Syne (700/800 uppercase display), Space Mono (400/700 body, labels, chrome), Yellowtail (script flourishes only); do not introduce any other color or font; neon yellow is an accent, never a slide background. (5) Use the theme's signature devices and only these: .panel-blue split panels (46% electric-blue gradient against navy), .halftone CSS radial-gradient dot textures faded with mask-image (white or neon variants, one corner patch per slide), rotated .badge neon stickers with hard offset shadows, .script Yellowtail flourishes for one emphasized word, and .ghost-num outlined giant numerals (-webkit-text-stroke in neon) for section dividers. (6) One signature easing cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); entrances via .reveal elements staggered with transition-delay (~0.1s steps) when the slide gains .visible; chart bars animate transform: scaleY from transform-origin bottom; animate only transform and opacity; prefers-reduced-motion support required. (7) No scrolling, no overflow; split content into more slides instead of shrinking type; low-density speaker-led decks get one idea per slide with 1-3 bullets, high-density reading-first decks get structured grids with max 4-6 cards. (8) Icons are inline SVG stroked in #d4ff00 (or #1a1a2e on neon ticks); no remote images, no chart libraries - bar charts are pure CSS. Start from the example.html seed in this plugin: keep its stage CSS (full viewport-base block), slide shell chrome (neon mono slide number top-left as NN / VOLT, uppercase mono breadcrumbs top-right with neon active item, baseline rule bottom), signature-device CSS, and the entire SlidePresentation controller script verbatim - replace only the slide content. Compose slides from the seed's layout masters: split cover, agenda rows, ghost-numeral section divider, neon-tick bullets, big neon stat, 2x2 principle grid with one blue .hot card, CSS bar chart, quote with script attribution, before/after comparison columns, script-word closing.
query.zh-CN: 用「创意伏特 Creative Voltage」锁定主题为 {{audience}} 创作一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（{{slideCount}}，{{density}}）：复古现代撞色——电光蓝 #0066ff × 深海军 #1a1a2e 双色分割版面、荧光黄 #d4ff00 徽章与高亮、halftone 网点纹理、script 手写点缀，字体锁定 Syne + Space Mono + Yellowtail，禁止引入规格外的颜色和字体。零依赖单文件 HTML，固定 1920x1080 舞台整体等比缩放适配视口（绝不按设备重排），每页一个 section.slide、用 .active/.visible 切换，键盘/滚轮/触摸导航 + hash 路由，.reveal 错峰入场（唯一缓动 cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)）并支持 prefers-reduced-motion。从插件内 example.html 种子出发：保留舞台系统、页面骨架 chrome、签名装置 CSS 和导航脚本，只替换内容；版式从种子的母版库中组合（分割封面、目录行、描边巨字章节页、荧光勾选 bullets、大数字页、2x2 卡片网格、纯 CSS 柱状图、引用页、前后对比、script 结尾）。完整硬性规格以英文 prompt 为准。

title_i18n.zh-CN: VOLTLAB · 创意伏特风格演示

inputs.name: topic
inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: A motion branding toolkit for small teams
